_about: The closed vocabulary + component DAG (docs/CONTRACT.md is the law; this file is the data). One file, two consumers: Subsystem.Analyzers reads it as an AdditionalFile (SS011-SS016); the Registrar seeds it into the namespace at boot (\System\Components). Registering anything here is a deliberate event.

Vom.name: Virtual Object Manager
Vom.note: the kernel; the one node type lives here

Dg.name: Diagnostics
Dg.note: records + ring; sinks are host drivers. Today reaches Hb/Rs/SessionManager - ratchet R3

Cm.name: Configuration Manager
Cm.note: volatile + durable planes; durable plane is a driver grant. Today probes MainActivity - ratchet R3

Hb.name: Heuristic Broker
Hb.note: model lifecycle + inference; the LiteRT seam

unassigned._about: Code that exists but whose component registration is a pending deliberate decision - do NOT coin codes for these in PRs.
areas: Host/ (ObpHost, ProjectionServer, Registrar, SubsystemApi, ModelsApi, Firewall) - ratchet R7
Pwsh/ (SessionManager, ReplEngine, Translator, HelpSystem, cmdlet families)

types._note: Descriptor/Routine/Dispatch/Information/Value/Directory/Type/Callback adopted 2026-06-12 from the primary-sourced NT taxonomy (SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR, IoCompletionRoutine, DispatchRoutine, FILE_BASIC_INFORMATION, CM_KEY_VALUE, OBJECT_DIRECTORY, OBJECT_TYPE, CALLBACK_OBJECT).

verbs._note: triage verbs exist in code today; each gets approved or mapped (Get->Query, List->Enumerate, ...) during the SS013 campaign. PowerShell cmdlets use the PS approved-verb list (Get-Verb), mapped at the boundary (Query<->Get).

banned._note: Manager is NT-canonical and allowed. Banned applies to OUR public type names in core components; SDK attribute types (CmdletProviderAttribute etc.) are foreign surface, not ours. Hosts (heads) are exempt entirely - the host IS the context, and Android-mandated names (Services/*Service, *Activity) live there. 'Endpoint' refused per CONTRACT.md section 4. 'Store' refused: commandment 1 is 'no second store' - the sin's name cannot be a blessed suffix; use Hive (Cm-canonical) for durable planes, Table/Record/Block for data structures. Existing core violations (Pp's IProvisioningHandler, Hb's AgentSessionStore) ride the ratchet baseline.

platformNames._about: SS011 collision guard: declaring a type with one of these names is an error UNLESS it inherits the platform base class it names (class X : Android.App.Service) or is allow-listed by namespace (types.shipped covers Ss.Vom's deliberate NT analogs - our Port IS the ALPC analog, by design).

paths._about: SS004/SS014 vocabulary. Roots migrated from SS004FabricatedPathAnalyzer.cs:29 (ratchet R10: the analyzer reads THIS file, not its own list). Segments are the starter set pending the census.

drivers._about: Where the physical world enters - granted at construction, normally mounted at Root by a head.
